--- title: Sequence Diagram - Mobile Repository Initialization (SQLite
Secure Storage) config: theme: base --- %% QuantumZero UML palette note: actors/external=#fff7e6/#b45309, system/component=#e0f2fe/#075985, datastore=#ecfccb/#4d7c0f, notes=#fff9c4/#d97706. Aligns diagrams to Deliverable 1 UML/DFD theme. %% Related: diagrams/class-mobile-repositories.mmd (DidRepository, CredentialRepository), diagrams/class-mobile-services.mmd (SecureStorageService) sequenceDiagram autonumber participant App as QuantumZero Mobile App participant Storage as SecureStorageService participant DidRepo as DidRepository participant CredRepo as CredentialRepository participant DB as Local SQLite (sqflite) App->>Storage: initialize() activate Storage Storage-->>App: ok deactivate Storage App->>DidRepo: initialize() activate DidRepo DidRepo->>DB: Open DB
ensure dids table activate DB DB-->>DidRepo: ok deactivate DB DidRepo-->>App: ok deactivate DidRepo App->>CredRepo: initialize() activate CredRepo CredRepo->>DB: Open DB
ensure credentials table activate DB DB-->>CredRepo: ok deactivate DB CredRepo-->>App: ok deactivate CredRepo
repo_description: The QuantumZero repository hosts the project’s public-facing static website, delivered through Static Pages. This site provides high-level information about the platform, including architectural overv

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个时序图，描述QuantumZero移动应用在启动时如何初始化本地数据层。核心流程是App先激活SecureStorageService，然后依次初始化DidRepository和CredentialRepository，这两个仓库底层都依赖Local SQLite。
明白了。我注意到DidRepository和CredentialRepository都要操作数据库，它们是共用同一个SQLite实例，还是各自独立连接？另外，sqflite这个标注需要体现在图里吗？
是同一个SQLite数据库实例，通过sqflite驱动。建议在数据库参与者名称里带上sqflite标注，比如写成"Local SQLite (sqflite)"。两个仓库分别确保自己的表存在——DidRepo管dids表，CredRepo管credentials表。
好的，我已经把五个参与者按从左到右顺序排好：App、SecureStorageService、DidRepository、CredentialRepository，最右边是Local SQLite (sqflite)。现在开始画第一条消息，App调用Storage的initialize()。
对，Storage初始化成功后返回ok，然后App再触发DidRepo的initialize()。这里要注意DidRepo激活后，它要向DB发送"Open DB & ensure dids table"，这是一个同步检查表结构的复合操作。
DidRepo的分支画好了，DB返回ok后DidRepo再返回给App。现在继续画CredentialRepository的初始化——它和DidRepo的流程对称，只是操作的表不同。
稍等，CredRepo的消息文本请写成"Open DB & ensure credentials table"，和DidRepo那边保持格式一致。另外确认一下，两个仓库的initialize()调用是串行的，App会等DidRepo完全结束再启动CredRepo。
收到，已经统一为"Open DB & ensure credentials table"。流程确实是串行的，三条生命线依次激活：Storage先激活后关闭，然后DidRepo激活-关闭，最后CredRepo激活-关闭。检查完毕，整个初始化时序符合你的描述。
没问题，这个时序图准确反映了移动端的仓库初始化机制。最后记得在备注里关联一下相关的类图文件：class-mobile-repositories.mmd和class-mobile-services.mmd。
